## Build with Claude

You've got a M5Stack Cardputer, a cable, and Claude Code. Tell Claude what to build (a magic 8-ball that answers when you shake it? A pocket weather report? A pixel pet that wiggles while Claude's thinking?). Claude will write the code and flash it over.

‍Try it out, then come back and make something else.

Explore GitHub repo

[Attend virtually](https://github.com/moremas/build-with-claude)Attend virtually

## Instructions

For step-by-step details, see the full README in the [GitHub repo](https://github.com/moremas/build-with-claude).

1.

Download the project files from the [GitHub repo](https://github.com/moremas/build-with-claude). Get the full suite of pre-made projects, dependencies, and the Claude Code skill.

2.

Plug your Cardputer into your laptop with the USB-C cable.

3.

Open Claude Code and point it to the downloaded folder.

4.

Follow the on-screen prompts to flash the projects onto your Cardputer.

5.

Explore the projects on your device, then use Claude Code to iterate, extend, or build something new.
